subsection.heading: Eligibility.—
subsection.content: Except as provided in this chapter, eligibility for membership in the corporation and the rights and privileges of members are as provided in the constitution and bylaws.

subsection.heading: Nondiscrimination.—
subsection.content: The terms of membership may not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, or national origin.

html:td.html:p: June 12, 1984, Pub. L. 98–314, § 5 (words before 3d comma, words after 3d comma related to discrimination in membership), 98 Stat. 238.
